news.paragraph: Recent headlines highlight significant activity in the AI sector, with mentions of companies like Quanta Services and Broadcom surging on AI-related growth. A major deal is creating one of the world's largest utilities, poised to be a key power provider for AI data centers. While airline fares are up, consumer spending on travel remains robust, and credit card trends show surprising consumer behavior. The overall narrative points to strong demand and growth within the AI infrastructure and related industries.

headlines.title: Quanta Services, IBD Stock Of The Day, Forges New Buy Point In AI Pullback
Airline Fares Are Up, But Americans Still Plan To Fly
Deal Creates One Of World's Largest Utilities, Major Power Provider For AI Data Centers
Broadcom Leads Five IBD 50 Stocks Near Buy Points; Most Are AI Plays
The Surprising Consumer Trend That Credit Cards Show
AI Data Center Power Equipment Supplier Surges As Growth Explodes
